data.title: US Economy Adds 256,000 Payrolls In December, Tight Labor Market Tops Forecasts: Dollar, Treasury Yields Spike
data.description: US labor market ends 2024 strong, adds 256,000 jobs in Dec. Unemployment rate falls to 4.1%. Health care, retail, and gov sectors drive gains.

data.title: Alibaba, Baidu, JD NIO, Li Auto Stocks Slide As Potential AI Chip Sanctions Add Pressure On China
data.description: US-listed Chinese stocks, including Alibaba, Baidu, JD.com, PDD Holdings, NIO, Li Auto, and XPeng, trade lower as US-China tensions rise over AI embargo.

data.title: PriceSmart Posts Weak Earnings, Joins Roku And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Friday's Pre-Market Session
Apple's Alarm Issue Persists: iOS 18 Fails To Fix The Longstanding Problem Leaving Users Oversleeping
data.description: Apple faces criticism as iPhone users report persistent alarm malfunctions on iOS 18, despite previous promises to address similar issues.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Hits $26.3 Billion Q4 Revenue, Reportedly Ends PowerAIR Deal Over Huawei Chip Breach Amid US Sanctions
data.description: TSMC reportedly ends collaboration with Singapore's PowerAIR after finding its chip in Huawei's AI processor; also faces US sanctions on Chinese customers.
